patthana22.36:1.1.pli: Nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ nasaraṇaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā anidassanaappaṭigho saraṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana22.36:2.1.pli: Nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ naaraṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca sanidassanasappaṭigho araṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … satta.

patthana22.36:3.1.pli: Naanidassanasappaṭighaṁ naaraṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca sanidassanasappaṭigho araṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … satta.

patthana22.36:4.1.pli: Nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ naaraṇañca naanidassanasappaṭighaṁ naaraṇañca dhammaṁ paṭicca sanidassanasappaṭigho araṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … satta. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana22.36:5.1.pli: Hetuyā ekavīsa, adhipatiyā ekavīsa …pe… avigate ekavīsa.

patthana22.36:7.1.pli: Nasanidassanasappaṭigho naaraṇo dhammo sanidassanasappaṭighassa araṇassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo … satta.

patthana22.36:8.1.pli: Naanidassanasappaṭigho naaraṇo dhammo sanidassanasappaṭighassa araṇassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo … satta.

patthana22.36:9.1.pli: Nasanidassanasappaṭigho naaraṇo ca naanidassanasappaṭigho naaraṇo ca dhammā sanidassanasappaṭighassa araṇassa dhammassa hetupaccayena paccayo … satta.

patthana22.36:10.1.pli: Nasanidassanasappaṭigho naaraṇo dhammo anidassanaappaṭighassa araṇassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. Naanidassanasappaṭigho naaraṇo dhammo anidassanaappaṭighassa araṇassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. Nasanidassanasappaṭigho naaraṇo ca naanidassanasappaṭigho naaraṇo ca dhammā anidassanaappaṭighassa araṇassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana22.36:11.1.pli: Hetuyā ekavīsa, ārammaṇe tīṇi, adhipatiyā ekavīsa, anantare tīṇi …pe… sahajāte nissaye ekavīsa, upanissaye tīṇi, pacchājāte kamme āhāre indriye jhāne magge vippayutte ekavīsa …pe… avigate ekavīsa.

patthana22.36:12.1.pli: (Yathā kusalattike pañhāvārassa anulomampi paccanīyampi anulomapaccanīyampi paccanīyānulomampi gaṇitaṁ, evaṁ gaṇetabbaṁ.)

patthana22.4:1.1.pli: Nakusalaṁ nahetuñceva naahetukañca dhammaṁ paṭicca akusalo hetu ceva sahetuko ca dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nakusalaṁ nahetuñceva naahetukañca dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato hetu ceva sahetuko ca dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … dve.

patthana22.4:2.1.pli: (Naakusale dve, naabyākate dve. Paṭhamaṁ gaṇitakena ekaṁ, dutiyaṁ gaṇitakena ekaṁ, tatiyaṁ gaṇitakena ekaṁ, sabbattha nava pañhā.)

patthana22.4:3.1.pli: Hetuyā nava …pe… vipāke tīṇi …pe… avigate nava.

patthana22.4:4.1.pli: Nakusalaṁ naahetukañceva na ca hetuṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca akusalo sahetuko ceva na ca hetu dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā nava …pe… vipāke tīṇi …pe… avigate nava.

patthana23.14:3.1.pli: Nakusalaṁ naaniyataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato aniyato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā pañca, adhipatiyā pañca …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana23.15:1.1.pli: Nakusalaṁ namaggārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā kusalo maggārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā cha …pe… avigate cha.

patthana23.15:2.1.pli: Nakusalaṁ namaggahetukaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā kusalo maggahetuko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana23.15:3.1.pli: Nakusalaṁ namaggādhipatiṁ dhammaṁ paccayā kusalo maggādhipati dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā cha …pe… avigate cha.

patthana23.16:1.1.pli: Nakusalo nauppanno dhammo kusalassa uppannassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana23.16:2.1.pli: Ārammaṇe aṭṭhārasa, adhipatiyā nava, upanissaye aṭṭhārasa.

patthana23.17:1.1.pli: Nakusalo napaccuppanno dhammo kusalassa paccuppannassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana23.17:2.1.pli: Ārammaṇe aṭṭhārasa, adhipatiyā anantare samanantare soḷasa, upanissaye aṭṭhārasa, natthiyā vigate soḷasa.

patthana23.17:3.1.pli: Nakusalaṁ naatītārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato atītārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana23.17:4.1.pli: Nakusalaṁ naanāgatārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā kusalo anāgatārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā nava …pe… vipāke tīṇi …pe… avigate nava.

patthana23.17:5.1.pli: Nakusalaṁ napaccuppannārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato paccuppannārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana23.18:1.1.pli: Nakusalo naajjhatto dhammo ajjhattassa kusalassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Ārammaṇe aṭṭhārasa, adhipatiyā soḷasa, upanissaye aṭṭhārasa, purejāte atthiyā avigate nava.

patthana23.18:2.1.pli: Nakusalo nabahiddhā dhammo bahiddhā kusalassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Ārammaṇe aṭṭhārasa, adhipatiyā cha, upanissaye aṭṭhārasa, purejāte atthiyā avigate nava.

patthana23.18:3.1.pli: Nakusalaṁ naajjhattārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato ajjhattārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana23.18:4.1.pli: Nakusalaṁ nabahiddhārammaṇaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato bahiddhārammaṇo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana23.19:1.1.pli: Nakusalaṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato sanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … ekaṁ.

patthana23.19:2.1.pli: Naakusalaṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato sanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … ekaṁ.

patthana23.19:3.1.pli: Naabyākataṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato sanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … ekaṁ.

patthana23.19:4.1.pli: Nakusalaṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighañca naabyākataṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighañca dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato sanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … ekaṁ.

patthana23.19:5.1.pli: Naakusalaṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighañca naabyākataṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighañca dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato sanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … ekaṁ.

patthana23.19:6.1.pli: Nakusalaṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighañca naakusalaṁ nasanidassanasappaṭighañca dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato sanidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … ekaṁ. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana23.19:7.1.pli: Hetuyā cha, adhipatiyā cha …pe… vipāke tīṇi …pe… avigate cha.

patthana23.19:8.1.pli: Nakusalaṁ naanidassanasappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato anidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā cha, adhipatiyā cha …pe… aññamaññe tīṇi …pe… vipāke tīṇi …pe… avigate cha.

patthana23.19:9.1.pli: Nakusalaṁ naanidassanaappaṭighaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato anidassanasappaṭigho dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana23.2:1.1.pli: Nakusalaṁ navipākaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato vipāko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … ekaṁ.

patthana23.2:2.1.pli: Naakusalaṁ navipākaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato vipāko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … ekaṁ.

patthana23.2:3.1.pli: Nakusalaṁ navipākañca naakusalaṁ navipākañca dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato vipāko dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … ekaṁ. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana23.2:5.1.pli: Nakusalaṁ navipākadhammadhammaṁ paccayā kusalo vipākadhammadhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nakusalaṁ navipākadhammadhammaṁ paccayā akusalo vipākadhammadhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … dve.

patthana23.2:6.1.pli: Naakusalaṁ navipākadhammadhammaṁ paccayā akusalo vipākadhammadhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … dve.

patthana23.2:7.1.pli: Nakusalaṁ navipākadhammadhammañca naakusalaṁ navipākadhammadhammañca dhammaṁ paccayā kusalo vipākadhammadhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … dve. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana23.2:9.1.pli: Nakusalaṁ nanevavipākanavipākadhammadhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato nevavipākanavipākadhammadhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana23.2:10.1.pli: Hetuyā cha, adhipatiyā cha …pe… aññamaññe tīṇi …pe… vipāke tīṇi …pe… avigate cha.

patthana23.20:1.1.pli: Nasukhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā sukhāya vedanāya sampayutto kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nasukhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā adukkhamasukhāya vedanāya sampayutto kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … dve.

patthana23.20:2.1.pli: Nadukkhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā sukhāya vedanāya sampayutto kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nadukkhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā adukkhamasukhāya vedanāya sampayutto kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … dve.

patthana23.20:3.1.pli: Naadukkhamasukhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā adukkhamasukhāya vedanāya sampayutto kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Naadukkhamasukhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā sukhāya vedanāya sampayutto kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā … dve. (Cattāri gaṇitakena dve dve pañhā kātabbā. Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana23.20:5.1.pli: Nasukhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ naakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā sukhāya vedanāya sampayutto akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. Nasukhāya vedanāya sampayuttaṁ naakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā dukkhāya vedanāya sampayutto akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.)

patthana23.20:7.1.pli: Nasukhāya vedanāya sampayutto naabyākato dhammo sukhāya vedanāya sampayuttassa abyākatassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo.

patthana23.20:8.1.pli: Ārammaṇe cuddasa, adhipatiyā dvādasa, anantare terasa, upanissaye ekavīsa, kamme sattarasa, natthiyā vigate terasa.

patthana23.21:1.1.pli: Navipākaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā vipākadhammadhammo kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana23.21:2.1.pli: Navipākaṁ naakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā vipākadhammadhammo akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana23.21:3.1.pli: Navipākaṁ naabyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nevavipākanavipākadhammadhammo abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi, adhipatiyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana23.22:1.1.pli: Naanupādinnupādāniyaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā anupādinnupādāniyo kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā cha …pe… avigate cha.

patthana23.22:2.1.pli: Naanupādinnupādāniyaṁ naakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā anupādinnupādāniyo akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana23.22:3.1.pli: Naupādinnupādāniyaṁ naabyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca anupādinnupādāniyo abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā pañca, adhipatiyā pañca …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana23.23:1.1.pli: Nasaṅkiliṭṭhasaṅkilesikaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā asaṅkiliṭṭhasaṅkilesiko kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā cha …pe… avigate cha.

patthana23.23:2.1.pli: Nasaṅkiliṭṭhasaṅkilesikaṁ naakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā saṅkiliṭṭhasaṅkilesiko akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana23.23:3.1.pli: Nasaṅkiliṭṭhasaṅkilesikaṁ naabyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca asaṅkiliṭṭhasaṅkilesiko abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā cha, adhipatiyā cha …pe… avigate cha.

patthana23.24:1.1.pli: Nasavitakkasavicāraṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā savitakkasavicāro kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā pannarasa …pe… avigate pannarasa.

patthana23.24:2.1.pli: Nasavitakkasavicāraṁ naakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā savitakkasavicāro akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā nava …pe… avigate nava.

patthana23.24:3.1.pli: Nasavitakkasavicāraṁ naabyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca avitakkaavicāro abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā satta, adhipatiyā satta …pe… avigate satta.

patthana23.25:1.1.pli: Napītisahagataṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā pītisahagato kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā aṭṭhavīsa …pe… avigate aṭṭhavīsa.

patthana23.25:2.1.pli: Napītisahagataṁ naakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā pītisahagato akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā aṭṭhavīsa …pe… avigate aṭṭhavīsa.

patthana23.25:3.1.pli: Napītisahagato naabyākato dhammo pītisahagatassa abyākatassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Ārammaṇe aṭṭhavīsa, adhipatiyā anantare aṭṭhavīsa …pe… upanissaye aṭṭhavīsa, kamme catuvīsa, natthiyā vigate aṭṭhavīsa.

patthana23.26:1.1.pli: Nadassanena pahātabbaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā nevadassanena nabhāvanāya pahātabbo kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana23.26:2.1.pli: Nadassanena pahātabbaṁ naakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā dassanena pahātabbo akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā cha …pe… avigate cha.

patthana23.26:3.1.pli: Nadassanena pahātabbaṁ naabyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nevadassanena nabhāvanāya pahātabbo abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā cha, adhipatiyā cha …pe… avigate cha.

patthana23.27:1.1.pli: Nadassanena pahātabbahetukaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā nevadassanena nabhāvanāya pahātabbahetuko kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana23.27:2.1.pli: Nadassanena pahātabbahetukaṁ naakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā dassanena pahātabbahetuko akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā cha, ārammaṇe nava, adhipatiyā cha …pe… avigate nava.

patthana23.27:3.1.pli: Nanevadassanena nabhāvanāya pahātabbahetukaṁ naabyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nevadassanena nabhāvanāya pahātabbahetuko abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā cha, adhipatiyā cha …pe… avigate cha.

patthana23.28:1.1.pli: Naācayagāmiṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā ācayagāmī kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā cha …pe… avigate cha.

patthana23.28:2.1.pli: Naācayagāmiṁ naakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā ācayagāmī akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana23.28:3.1.pli: Naācayagāmiṁ naabyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nevācayagāmināpacayagāmī abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā pañca, adhipatiyā pañca …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana23.29:1.1.pli: Nasekkhaṁ nakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā sekkho kusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā cha …pe… avigate cha.

patthana23.29:2.1.pli: Nasekkhaṁ naakusalaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā nevasekkhanāsekkho akusalo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana23.29:3.1.pli: Nasekkhaṁ naabyākataṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca nevasekkhanāsekkho abyākato dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā pañca, adhipatiyā pañca …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana23.3:1.1.pli: Nakusalo naupādinnupādāniyo dhammo abyākatassa upādinnupādāniyassa dhammassa ārammaṇapaccayena paccayo … cha pañhā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Ārammaṇe cha, anantare samanantare upanissaye cha, purejāte tīṇi, kamme pañca, āhāre tīṇi, atthiyā tīṇi …pe… avigate tīṇi.

patthana23.3:2.1.pli: Nakusalaṁ naanupādinnupādāniyaṁ dhammaṁ paṭicca abyākato anupādinnupādāniyo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā pañca, adhipatiyā pañca …pe… vipāke tīṇi …pe… avigate pañca.

patthana23.3:3.1.pli: Nakusalaṁ naanupādinnaanupādāniyaṁ dhammaṁ paccayā kusalo anupādinnaanupādāniyo dhammo uppajjati hetupaccayā. (Saṅkhittaṁ.) Hetuyā cha, ārammaṇe cha …pe… āsevane tīṇi …pe… vipāke tīṇi …pe… avigate cha.
